tooltip-ca-editsource: Wax ka bedel xofta fura ee boggaan
tooltip-ca-editsource-local: Wax ka beddel koodhka isha ee bogga sharraxaadda maxalliga ah
tooltip-ca-createsource-local: Samee koodhka isha ee bogga sharraxaadda maxalliga ah
visualeditor-autosave-modified-prompt-me: Boggan waa la tafatiray tan iyo markii aad ugu dambeysay aad soo shubtay. Ma jeclaan lahayd inaad dib u sii waddo tafatirka {{GENDER:|aga}} ee nuqulkii hore, mise aad bilaabdo tafatir cusub oo nuqulka ugu dambeeya?
visualeditor-ca-createlocaldescriptionso: Ku dar isha sharraxaadda maxalliga ah
visualeditor-ca-editlocaldescriptionsour: Wax ka beddel isha sharraxaadda maxalliga ah
visualeditor-dialog-extension-abandonedi: Ma hubtaa inaad rabto inaad xirto sanduuqan wada-hadal adigoon ku dabaqin isbeddelladaada?
visualeditor-dialog-media-position-check: Waxaad ka dhigi kartaa shaygan warbaahinta inuu si toos ah ugu dhex muuqdo qoraalka bogga halkii uu sabayn lahaa. Waa in aad tan si dhif ah u isticmaashaa, maadaama ay kala goyn karto socodka qoraalka haddii aad ka saarto calaamadda sanduuqan.
visualeditor-dialog-meta-categories-defa: Waxaad beddeli kartaa sida boggan loo kala saarayo marka lagu muujiyo qayb dhexdeeda adigoo dejinaya tilmaame kale oo lagu kala saaro. Tan waxaa badanaa loo isticmaalaa in bogagga dadka lagu muujiyo magaca dambe, balse magaca hore la hormariyo marka bogga la magacaabayo.
visualeditor-dialog-meta-categories-sort: U kala sooc boggan sidii uu u magacaaban yahay
visualeditor-dialog-meta-settings-displa: Waxaad beddeli kartaa sida cinwaanka boggan loo muujiyo adigoo dejinaya summad kale oo lagu soo bandhigo halkiisa.
visualeditor-dialog-meta-settings-nocont: Ha u beddelin nuxurka noocyada kala duwan ee luqadda
visualeditor-editnotices-tool: {{PLURAL:$1|ma jirto wargalin|hal wargalin|laba wargalinood|$1 wargalinno|$1 wargalin}}
visualeditor-linkcontext-uneditable: Waan ka xunnahay, xiriirkan hadda kaliya waxaa lagu beddeli karaa habka isha.
visualeditor-linkinspector-invalid-block: Dadka wiki-gan waxay go’aansadeen in la xannibo xiriirrada goobtan. Fadlan isku day xiriir kale.
visualeditor-mweditmodesource-tool-unava: Tafatirka koodhka halkan lagama heli karo
visualeditor-mweditmodeve-showagain: Ha mar kale i tusin fariintan
visualeditor-mweditmodeve-tool-unavailab: Tafatirka muuqaalka halkan lagama heli karo
visualeditor-mweditmodewt-popup-body: Waxaad mar kasta ku beddeli kartaa tafatirka koodhka adigoo gujinaya astaantan.
visualeditor-mwgallerydialog-mode-dropdo: Waxaa lagu buuxiyay qoraallo dul saaran
visualeditor-mwgallerydialog-styles-inpu: Xeerarka CSS, oo lagu kala saaray semicolon
visualeditor-preference-newwikitextedito: Isticmaal habka wikitext ee ku jira tifaftiraha muuqaalka, halkii aad ka adeegsan lahayd tifaftire wikitext oo kale
visualeditor-preference-tabs-multi-tab: Ii muuji labada tab ee tafatirka
visualeditor-preference-tabs-prefer-ve: Had iyo jeer i sii tifaftiraha muuqaalka haddii ay suurtagal tahay
visualeditor-preference-tabs-prefer-wt: Had iyo jeer i sii tifaftiraha koodhka
visualeditor-preference-tabs-remember-la: Xusuuso tafatirihii aan ugu dambeeyay isticmaalay
visualeditor-preference-collab-descripti:
Invite other users to join your edit session in the visual editor.
Ku casuun isticmaaleyaal kale inay ku soo biiraan fadhigaaga tafatirka ee tifaftiraha muuqaalka.
visualeditor-rebase-client-title-help: Waxaad awoodi doontaa inaad dib u eegto isbeddellada ka hor inta aan la kaydin.
visualeditor-recreate: Boggan waa la tirtiray tan iyo markii aad bilowday tafatirka. Riix "$1" si aad mar kale u abuurto.
visualeditor-savedialog-identify-anon: Mar dambe kuma gashanid. Haddii aad sii waddo, ciwaankaaga IP-ga ayaa la duubi doonaa taariikhda wax ka beddelka boggan.
visualeditor-savedialog-identify-temp: Waxaad hadda isticmaaleysaa magaca isticmaale ee ku meelgaarka ah $1. Haddii aad sii waddo, wax ka beddelkaaga waxaa lala xiriirin doonaa magacan isticmaale.
visualeditor-savedialog-identify-user: Waxaad hadda ku gashay sidii [[User:$1|$1]]. Haddii aad sii waddo, wax ka beddelkaaga waxaa lala xiriirin doonaa akoonkan.
visualeditor-savedialog-keyboard-shortcu: Waxaad riixi kartaa $1 si aad u kaydiso wax ka beddelkaaga.
visualeditor-savedialog-review-nosummary: Ma jiro koobitaanka wax ka beddelka
visualeditor-savedialog-title-preview: Eeg isbeddelladaada ka hor inta aanad kaydin
visualeditor-loaderror-revidconflict: Aqoonsiyada dib u eegista ee uu server-ku soo celiyay isma waafaqsana (dukumeenti: $1, metadata: $2).
visualeditor-loaderror-wrongmode: Waxaa la isku dayay in tafatiraha lagu shubo hab khaldan (nooca xogta: "$1", habka tafatirka: "$2").
visualeditor-toload: Tafatiraha hadda wuu soo shubanayaa. Haddii aad weli aragto fariintan dhowr ilbiriqsi kadib, fadlan [$1 dib u cusboonaysii bogga].
visualeditor-wikitext-warning: Waxaad isticmaaleysaa tafatiraha muuqaalka - [[{{MediaWiki:visualeditor-wikitext-warning-link}}|wikitext]] halkan kama shaqeeyo. Si aad ugu beddesho tafatirka koodhka wakhti kasta adigoon lumin isbeddelladaada, riix badhanka beddelka.
visualeditor-wikitextconvert-message: Waxaad dhejisay nuxur leh qaabayn hodan ah. Ma rabtaa in qaabayntan loo beddelo wikitext?
